channel.title: 5 Apps on Tech Tracker

item.title: 5 Apps That Pay You For Installing Apps - Recharge Apps - 2020
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-LPNM3vNkO5Q/XoIdfAJhbzI/AAAAAAAABRs/hXf3CA4aTtE2yhxIneEhMLx9Lf_PEEl7QCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200111_105332_780-02-19.jpeg" alt=""> Tech Tracker | There are many apps in playstore that pay for submitting surveys, installing apps watching videos, and and for reading news and giving daily attendance to apps well most of the apps have amazing refferal bonus that most of them that we mention now to be giving instant cash and some may take take whatever these are some apps that we found give recharge and Paytm cash and vouchers for installing apps and some other things each app differ from each so get to know about it before using it.
